title: FORISEC Project Context Bundle (PHASE 1)
description: Compact, deterministic, read-only bootstrap bundle for a new FORISEC chat. Produced only by pipeline/context_builder.py from already-written canonical sources and agent state files -- never a live scan, never an LLM guess. See that module's docstring for the exact read contract.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON schema document itself.

context_model_version.description: Version of the context_builder.py extraction/summarization logic. Bumped whenever the builder's fields or semantics change -- independent of schema_version.

project_id.description: FIXED project identifier constant, always exactly 'forisec-cl3-2026' (context/identity.py::PROJECT_ID). Never derived from config/canonical_documents.json's 'project' field, which is only a short display label and must never double as this unique identifier.

project_short_name.description: FIXED short display label constant, always exactly 'FORISEC' (context/identity.py::PROJECT_SHORT_NAME). Not a unique identifier on its own.

project_display_name.description: FIXED human-readable project name constant, always exactly 'FORISEC — HORIZON-CL3-2026-02-CS-ECCC-01' (context/identity.py::PROJECT_DISPLAY_NAME).

context_namespace.description: FIXED context namespace constant, always exactly 'forisec_cl3_2026' (context/identity.py::CONTEXT_NAMESPACE). Any consumer (retrieval, generation marker, MCP tools) must reject a bundle/context.db whose project_id or context_namespace does not match these constants.

repo_commit.description: Short commit hash of FORISEC_REPO_ROOT (the proposal repository) at generation time, from a safe fixed `git rev-parse --short HEAD` call. Null only if git metadata was unavailable.

service_commit.description: Short commit hash of this dashboard/service repository (forisec-cl3-dashboard) at generation time. Null only if git metadata was unavailable.

generation_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific bundle generation (UUID4). Changes on every run, even if content is identical.

freshness.description: FRESH: every consumed state input's own repo_commit matches repo_commit above, and all required inputs were present and valid. STALE: at least one consumed state input has a different, or missing, repo_commit than the proposal repo's live HEAD, or inputs are known-invalid/mixed. UNAVAILABLE: the bundle itself could not be produced with any confidence (used only for the API's synthetic fallback object, never written by the builder for a successful run of any freshness).

canonical_sources.description: One entry per canonical document listed in config/canonical_documents.json -- path, title, required_phase, required flag only. Never the document body.

architecture_summary.description: Deterministic extraction from 00_baseline/FORITECH_SYSTEM_INDEX.md -- headings/section titles only (a table of contents), never full prose.

current_state.description: One-line status per producer agent (freshness/result only, never the full state file).

work_package_summary.description: Per-WP coverage/status only, derived from proposal_evidence_state.json's criterion_evidence and register_readiness -- never re-derived from raw WP documents.

partner_summary.description: Per-partner readiness, copied field-for-field from proposal_evidence_state.json's partner_readiness (no reinterpretation).

budget_summary.description: Top-level totals only from budget_state.json (total_pm, total_eur, any_missing) -- never the full per-WP row breakdown.

evaluation_summary.description: diagnostic_score, fundability, overall_status, competitive_assessment.score/label from proposal_intelligence_state.json.

critical_findings.description: Only severity=='critical' findings, deduplicated by canonical_issue_key, from guardian_state.json/evidence_state contradictions. Each entry carries an exact source_path.

completed_work.description: Safely classified recent git commits (hash, date, subject, conventional-commit category only). Never an interpretation of a commit message as a final project decision.

proposal_completed_work.description: Same shape as completed_work, filtered to the proposal repository's own commits.

service_completed_work.description: Same shape as completed_work, filtered to this dashboard service's own commits.

constraints.description: Fixed, hardcoded list of standing engineering constraints for this project (isolation from foritech-os, read-only agents, etc.) -- not derived from any file, documented directly in context_builder.py.

next_actions.description: Deterministically derived from current_state/critical_findings/evidence gaps (e.g. 'N partner profile(s) empty') -- never a free-form LLM suggestion.

retrieval_index.description: Flat list of {label, source_path} pairs pointing at every source_path referenced elsewhere in this bundle, for a future PHASE 2 retrieval layer. No content, only pointers.

source_map.description: Which top-level bundle field(s) came from which exact source path(s) -- a per-field provenance index.
